name: Fujian Fynex Textile Science & Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Fujian Fynex Textile Science & Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the production, dyeing, finishing, and sale of knitted fabrics and tube dyed yarns primarily in China. The company offers member products; imitation cotton, segment-color yarn, mercerized cotton, CDP, pique, ordinary, and functional series dyeing products; printing series products; and stripes terry toweling products. It also exports its products. The company was founded in 1991 and is based in Jinjiang, China.
